upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saNkzRutyeva gAyet saNkzRutyeva hi vAcaM puruzo vadati' (zaqviMSa॰2.2) saNkzRutya=niSAya tIvraM tAraM kftvetyarTaH
'vakzaH pIWe GanAstrabraRakiRakaWine saMkzRuvAnaH pfzatkAn' (hanumannAwake 131) tIkzRI kurvannityarTaH samaH kzRuva iti taN
'fBurvAja fBukzAH patyate Savo'va kzROmi dAsasya nAma cit' (f0 10232) avakzROmi=pramArjmi
